MAPPLET.DESCRIPTION: This mapplet is responsible for getting the correct exchange rates for a date chosen, where a currency conversion to any of the three possible global currencies is involved.
MAPPLET.NAME: MPLT_CURCY_CONVERSION_RATES_ToGlobalCurrenciesOnly

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF(ISNULL(DOC_TO_LOC_EXCH_RATE), IIF(LOC_CURR_CODE = DOC_CURR_CODE, 1.0, IIF(DOC_CURR_CODE = 'STAT', 1.0, IIF(ISNULL(LOC_CURR_CODE), NULL, :LKP.LKP_W_EXCH_RATE(DOC_CURR_CODE,LOC_CURR_CODE,EXCH_DT,LOC_RATE_TYPE_VAR,DATASOURCE_NUM_ID)))), DOC_TO_LOC_EXCH_RATE)
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: DOC_TO_LOC_EXCH_RATE_VAR

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF(ISNULL(GLOBAL1_CURR_CODE), NULL, IIF(GLOBAL1_CURR_CODE = DOC_CURR_CODE, 1.0, IIF(DOC_CURR_CODE = 'STAT', 1.0, IIF(GLOBAL1_CURR_CODE = LOC_CURR_CODE, DOC_TO_LOC_EXCH_RATE_VAR, :LKP.LKP_W_EXCH_RATE(DOC_CURR_CODE, GLOBAL1_CURR_CODE, EXCH_DT,GLOBAL1_RATE_TYPE, DATASOURCE_NUM_ID)))))
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: DOC_TO_GLOBAL1_EXCH_RATE_VAR

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF(ISNULL(GLOBAL2_CURR_CODE), NULL, IIF(GLOBAL2_CURR_CODE = GLOBAL1_CURR_CODE, IIF(GLOBAL1_RATE_TYPE = GLOBAL2_RATE_TYPE , DOC_TO_GLOBAL1_EXCH_RATE_VAR,:LKP.LKP_W_EXCH_RATE(DOC_CURR_CODE, GLOBAL2_CURR_CODE, EXCH_DT,GLOBAL2_RATE_TYPE, DATASOURCE_NUM_ID)), IIF(GLOBAL2_CURR_CODE = DOC_CURR_CODE, 1.0, IIF(DOC_CURR_CODE = 'STAT', 1.0, IIF(GLOBAL2_CURR_CODE = LOC_CURR_CODE, DOC_TO_LOC_EXCH_RATE_VAR, :LKP.LKP_W_EXCH_RATE(DOC_CURR_CODE, GLOBAL2_CURR_CODE, EXCH_DT,GLOBAL2_RATE_TYPE, DATASOURCE_NUM_ID))))))
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: DOC_TO_GLOBAL2_EXCH_RATE_VAR

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF(ISNULL(GLOBAL3_CURR_CODE), NULL, IIF(GLOBAL3_CURR_CODE = GLOBAL1_CURR_CODE, IIF(GLOBAL3_RATE_TYPE = GLOBAL1_RATE_TYPE , DOC_TO_GLOBAL1_EXCH_RATE_VAR,:LKP.LKP_W_EXCH_RATE(DOC_CURR_CODE, GLOBAL3_CURR_CODE, EXCH_DT,GLOBAL3_RATE_TYPE, DATASOURCE_NUM_ID)), IIF(GLOBAL3_CURR_CODE = GLOBAL2_CURR_CODE, IIF(GLOBAL3_RATE_TYPE = GLOBAL2_RATE_TYPE , DOC_TO_GLOBAL2_EXCH_RATE_VAR,:LKP.LKP_W_EXCH_RATE(DOC_CURR_CODE, GLOBAL3_CURR_CODE, EXCH_DT,GLOBAL3_RATE_TYPE, DATASOURCE_NUM_ID)), IIF(GLOBAL3_CURR_CODE = DOC_CURR_CODE, 1.0, IIF(DOC_CURR_CODE = 'STAT', 1.0, IIF(GLOBAL3_CURR_CODE = LOC_CURR_CODE, DOC_TO_LOC_EXCH_RATE_VAR, :LKP.LKP_W_EXCH_RATE(DOC_CURR_CODE, GLOBAL3_CURR_CODE, EXCH_DT,GLOBAL3_RATE_TYPE, DATASOURCE_NUM_ID)))))))
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: DOC_TO_GLOBAL3_EXCH_RATE_VAR

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: For a given "from currency code" and exchange date, this lookup finds the conversion rate to the three possible global currency codes.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: LKP_W_EXCH_RATE

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT W_EXCH_RATE_G.EXCH_RATE AS EXCH_RATE, W_EXCH_RATE_G.FROM_CURCY_CD AS FROM_CURCY_CD, W_EXCH_RATE_G.TO_CURCY_CD AS TO_CURCY_CD, W_EXCH_RATE_G.START_DT AS START_DT, W_EXCH_RATE_G.END_DT AS END_DT, W_EXCH_RATE_G.RATE_TYPE AS RATE_TYPE, W_EXCH_RATE_G.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AS DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM W_EXCH_RATE_G, ( SELECT GLOBAL1_CURR_CODE REQUIRED_TO_CURR, GLOBAL1_RATE_TYPE REQUIRED_RATE_TYPE, DATASOURCE_NUM_ID DSN FROM W_GLOBAL_CURR_G UNION SELECT GLOBAL2_CURR_CODE REQUIRED_TO_CURR, GLOBAL2_RATE_TYPE REQUIRED_RATE_TYPE, DATASOURCE_NUM_ID DSN FROM W_GLOBAL_CURR_G UNION SELECT GLOBAL3_CURR_CODE REQUIRED_TO_CURR, GLOBAL3_RATE_TYPE REQUIRED_RATE_TYPE, DATASOURCE_NUM_ID DSN FROM W_GLOBAL_CURR_G ) GLOBAL_CURR WHERE W_EXCH_RATE_G.TO_CURCY_CD = GLOBAL_CURR.REQUIRED_TO_CURR AND W_EXCH_RATE_G.RATE_TYPE = GLOBAL_CURR.REQUIRED_RATE_TYPE AND W_EXCH_RATE_G.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = GLOBAL_CURR.DSN

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: FROM_CURCY_CD = IN_FROM_CURCY_CD AND TO_CURCY_CD = IN_TO_CURCY_CD AND START_DT <= IN_EXCH_DT AND END_DT > IN_EXCH_DT AND RATE_TYPE = IN_RATE_TYPE AND DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = IN_DATASOURCE_NUM_ID

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: This mapplet is responsible for getting the correct exchange rates for a date chosen, where a currency conversion to any of the three possible global currencies is involved.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: MPLT_CURCY_CONVERSION_RATES_ToGlobalCurrenciesOnly

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: For a given "from currency code" and exchange date, this lookup finds the conversion rate to the three possible global currency codes.
INSTANCE.NAME: LKP_W_EXCH_RATE

METADATAEXTENSION.DESCRIPTION: The target data model version that this mapping is designed to load
METADATAEXTENSION.NAME: OLAP_Version

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: (select max(to_char(trunc(sysdate),'yyyymmdd')) as dates from w_etl_run_s) union (select distinct to_char(to_date(M_END_CAL_DT_WID,'yyyymmdd'),'yyyymmdd') as dates from w_day_d where calendar_date between add_months(to_date(to_char(trunc(sysdate),'yyyymmdd'),'yyyymmdd'),-11) and add_months(to_date(to_char(trunc(sysdate),'yyyymmdd'),'yyyymmdd'),-1))

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT paaf.ASSIGNMENT_ID as ASSIGNMENT_ID, paaf.JOB_ID as JOB_ID, paaf.GRADE_ID as GRADE_ID, paaf.PERSON_ID as PERSON_ID, paaf.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE as EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, paaf.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE as EFFECTIVE_END_DATE FROM PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F paaf where paaf.PRIMARY_FLAG='Y'

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: PERSON_ID = IN_PERSON_ID AND EFFECTIVE_START_DATE <= IN_SNAPSHOT_DATE AND EFFECTIVE_END_DATE >= IN_SNAPSHOT_DATE

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT paaf.ASS_ATTRIBUTE27 as SUP_BUS_ORG_ID, paaf.PERSON_ID AS PERSON_ID, paaf.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AS EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, paaf.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE AS EFFECTIVE_END_DATE from PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F paaf, per_person_type_usages_f pptu, per_person_types ppt where paaf.person_id = pptu.person_id and ppt.person_type_id = pptu.person_type_id and paaf.business_group_id=0 and ppt.user_person_type like 'Expatriate%' and paaf.primary_flag='Y'

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: PERSON_ID = Supervisor_id AND EFFECTIVE_START_DATE <= Snapshot_date AND EFFECTIVE_END_DATE >= Snapshot_date

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.ORGANIZATION_ID ||'@' ||PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID ||'@' || PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.LOCATION_ID ||'@' || PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.JOB_ID as SUP_BUS_ORG_ID, PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.PERSON_ID AS PERSON_ID, PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AS EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE AS EFFECTIVE_END_DATE from PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: PERSON_ID = Supervisor_id AND EFFECTIVE_START_DATE <= Snapshot_date AND EFFECTIVE_END_DATE >= Snapshot_date

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT PER_PERFORMANCE_REVIEWS.NEXT_PERF_REVIEW_DATE AS NEXT_PERF_REVIEW_DATE, PER_PERFORMANCE_REVIEWS.PERSON_ID AS PERSON_ID, PER_PERFORMANCE_REVIEWS.REVIEW_DATE AS REVIEW_DATE FROM PER_PERFORMANCE_REVIEWS

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.PERSON_ID as PERSON_ID, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID as BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.PERF_RATING as PERF_RATING, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.DFLT_RATING_PCT as DFLT_RATING_PCT, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.RATING_LEVEL_ID as RATING_LEVEL_ID, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.PERFORMANCE_REVIEW_ID as PERFORMANCE_REVIEW_ID, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.PERF_REVIEW_TYPE as PERF_REVIEW_TYPE, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.X_REVIEW_TYPE as X_REVIEW_TYPE, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.TEMPLATE_NAME as TEMPLATE_NAME, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.TEMPLATE_ID as TEMPLATE_ID, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.DATA_LAST_UPDATE_DATE as DATA_LAST_UPDATE_DATE, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.PROCESS_FLG as PROCESS_FLG, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.ASSIGNMENT_ID as ASSIGNMENT_ID, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE as EFFECTIVE_START_DATE FROM WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT QN.person_id AS PERSON_ID, QN.fiscal_month AS FISCAL_MONTH, QN.interview_type AS INTERVIEW_TYPE, QN.rating AS RATING, QN.review_date AS REVIEW_DATE, to_date((lead(to_number(to_char(QN.review_date,'yyyymmdd')),1,47121231)over(partition by QN.person_id order by QN.person_id,QN.fiscal_month)),'yyyymmdd') as next_reveiw_date FROM (SELECT person_id, EXTRACT (YEAR FROM a.review_date) || '/' || LPAD(EXTRACT (MONTH FROM a.review_date), 2, '0') AS Fiscal_Month, rank() OVER (partition BY person_id,EXTRACT (YEAR FROM a.review_date) || '/' || LPAD(EXTRACT (MONTH FROM a.review_date), 2, '0') ORDER BY person_id,EXTRACT (YEAR FROM a.review_date) || '/' || LPAD(EXTRACT (MONTH FROM a.review_date), 2, '0'), a.review_date DESC) AS ranks, (SELECT meaning FROM apps.fnd_lookup_values WHERE lookup_type = 'EMP_INTERVIEW_TYPE' AND language = 'US' AND lookup_code = b.type ) AS interview_type, (SELECT meaning FROM apps.fnd_lookup_values WHERE lookup_type = 'PERFORMANCE_RATING' AND language = 'US' AND lookup_code = a.performance_rating ) AS Rating, a.review_date FROM per_performance_reviews a, per_events b WHERE a.event_id = b.event_id --and a.person_id in( 98873 ,98601) AND TRUNC(a.review_date, 'MONTH') >= to_date('01-10-2014', 'DD-MM-YYYY') ORDER BY 1,2,5 ) QN WHERE ranks = 1

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: PERSON_ID = IN_PERSON_ID AND REVIEW_DATE <= SNAPSHOT_DATE AND NEXT_REVEIW_DATE > SNAPSHOT_DATE

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT CASE WHEN PEI_INFORMATION1 = 'YES' THEN 'Y' ELSE PEI_INFORMATION1 END AS ECR_FLAG , PERSON_ID AS PERSON_ID FROM PER_PEOPLE_EXTRA_INFO WHERE INFORMATION_TYPE = 'JEG_HR_DIVESTITURE_NEW'--

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF ((BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = 0 OR BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = 880 OR BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = 1394 OR BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = 3467 OR BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = 3469),:LKP.LKP_GRE_ID (SOFT_CODING_KEYFLEX_ID),X_ASS_ATTRIBUTE16 )
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: out_GRE_ID

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: select VALUE.INPUT_VALUE_ID as INPUT_VALUE_ID, ELMNT.input_currency_code AS INPUT_CURRENCY_CODE from PAY_ELEMENT_TYPES_F ELMNT, PAY_INPUT_VALUES_F VALUE where ELMNT.ELEMENT_TYPE_ID=VALUE.ELEMENT_TYPE_ID

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT temp.ASSIGNMENT_ID as ASSIGNMENT_ID, temp.ORG_ENTRY_DATE as ORG_ENTRY_DATE , temp.ORGANIZATION_ID as ORGANIZATION_ID FROM (SELECT CURR_org.ASSIGNMENT_ID, MIN(curr_org.effective_Start_date) AS ORG_ENTRY_DATE, curr_org.ORGANIZATION_ID AS ORGANIZATION_ID, prev_org.ORGANIZATION_ID AS PREV_ORGANIZATION_ID, MAX(NVL(prev_org.effective_end_date, to_date(19010101, 'YYYYMMDD'))) AS ORG_EXIT_DATE
FROM PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F curr_org LEFT OUTER JOIN PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F prev_org ON curr_org.assignment_id = prev_org.assignment_id AND curr_org.effective_Start_date > prev_org.effective_end_date AND curr_org.ORGANIZATION_ID <> prev_org.ORGANIZATION_ID
WHERE curr_org.ORGANIZATION_ID IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY CURR_org.ASSIGNMENT_ID, curr_org.ORGANIZATION_ID, prev_org.ORGANIZATION_ID) temp
GROUP BY ASSIGNMENT_ID, ORG_ENTRY_DATE, ORGANIZATION_ID

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: ASSIGNMENT_ID = ASSIGNMENT_ID_I AND ORG_ENTRY_DATE <= SNAPSHOT_DATE_IN AND ORGANIZATION_ID = ORGANIZATION_ID_IN

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT temp.ASSIGNMENT_ID as ASSIGNMENT_ID, temp.JOB_ENTRY_DATE as JOB_ENTRY_DATE,temp.JOB_ID as JOB_ID FROM (SELECT CURR_job.ASSIGNMENT_ID, MIN(curr_job.effective_Start_date) AS JOB_ENTRY_DATE, curr_job.JOB_ID AS JOB_ID, prev_job.JOB_ID AS PREV_JOB_ID, MAX(NVL(prev_job.effective_end_date, to_date(19010101, 'YYYYMMDD'))) AS JOB_EXIT_DATE
FROM PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F curr_job LEFT OUTER JOIN PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F prev_job ON curr_job.assignment_id = prev_job.assignment_id AND curr_job.effective_Start_date > prev_job.effective_end_date AND curr_job.JOB_ID <> prev_job.JOB_ID
WHERE curr_job.JOB_ID IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY CURR_job.ASSIGNMENT_ID, curr_job.JOB_ID, prev_job.JOB_ID) temp
GROUP BY ASSIGNMENT_ID, JOB_ENTRY_DATE, JOB_ID

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: ASSIGNMENT_ID = ASSIGNMENT_ID_IN AND JOB_ENTRY_DATE <= SNAPSHOT_DATE_IN AND JOB_ID = JOB_ID_IN

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: select assignment_id as ASSIGNMENT_ID,change_date AS CHANGE_DATE,PROPOSED_SALARY_N AS PREV_PROPOSED_SALARY_N from per_pay_proposals

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT temp.ASSIGNMENT_ID as ASSIGNMENT_ID, temp.GRD_ENTRY_DATE as GRD_ENTRY_DATE, temp.GRADE_ID as GRADE_ID FROM (SELECT CURR_GRD.ASSIGNMENT_ID, MIN(curr_grd.effective_Start_date) AS GRD_ENTRY_DATE, curr_grd.grade_id AS GRADE_ID, prev_grd.grade_id AS PREV_GRADE_ID, MAX(NVL(prev_grd.effective_end_date, to_date(19010101, 'YYYYMMDD'))) AS GRD_EXIT_DATE
FROM PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F curr_grd LEFT OUTER JOIN PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F prev_grd ON curr_grd.assignment_id = prev_grd.assignment_id AND curr_grd.effective_Start_date > prev_grd.effective_end_date AND curr_grd.grade_id <> prev_grd.grade_id
WHERE curr_grd.grade_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY CURR_GRD.ASSIGNMENT_ID, curr_grd.grade_id, prev_grd.grade_id) temp
GROUP BY ASSIGNMENT_ID, GRD_ENTRY_DATE, GRADE_ID

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: ASSIGNMENT_ID = ASSIGNMENT_ID_IN AND GRD_ENTRY_DATE <= SNAPSHOT_DATE_IN AND GRADE_ID = GRADE_ID_IN

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: to_char(ASSIGNMENT_STATUS_TYPE_ID) || '~' || to_char(PERSON_TYPE_ID) || '~'|| ASSIGNMENT_TYPE || '~'|| PRIMARY_FLAG || '~'|| EMPLOYMENT_CATEGORY || '~'|| LABOUR_UNION_MEMBER_FLAG || '~'|| PAY_BASIS || '~'|| JOB_FLSA_CODE
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: EMPLOYMENT_ID

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: iif(BUSINESS_GROUP_ID=0 AND instr(USER_PERSON_TYPE,'Expatriate')=1 AND NOT ISNULL(ASS_ATTRIBUTE27) ,ASS_ATTRIBUTE27,LOCATION_ID)
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: V_WORK_LOCATION_ID

METADATAEXTENSION.NAME: SQL_Query
METADATAEXTENSION.VALUE:
SELECT /*+leading(ppt) no_push_pred(pptu)*/ distinct paaf.ASSIGNMENT_ID AS ASSIGNMENT_ID , paaf.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AS EFFECTIVE_START_DATE , paaf.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE AS EFFECTIVE_END_DATE , paaf.PERSON_ID AS PERSON_ID , paaf.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AS BUSINESS_GROUP_ID , paaf.ORGANIZATION_ID AS ORGANIZATION_ID , loc.LOCATION_CODE AS LOCATION_CODE , paaf.ASS_ATTRIBUTE16 AS ASS_ATTRIBUTE16 , paaf.SOFT_CODING_KEYFLEX_ID AS SOFT_CODING_KEYFLEX_ID , papf.DATE_OF_BIRTH AS DATE_OF_BIRTH , past.ASSIGNMENT_STATUS_TYPE_ID AS ASSIGNMENT_STATUS_TYPE_ID , ppt.PERSON_TYPE_ID AS PERSON_TYPE_ID , paaf.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE AS ASSIGNMENT_TYPE , paaf.PRIMARY_FLAG AS PRIMARY_FLAG , PAAF.EMPLOYMENT_CATEGORY AS EMPLOYMENT_CATEGORY , CASE WHEN (paaf.LABOUR_UNION_MEMBER_FLAG = 'Y' OR (paaf.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = 880 AND paaf.ASS_ATTRIBUTE25 IS NOT NULL ) ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS LABOUR_UNION_MEMBER_FLAG
, ppb.PAY_BASIS AS PAY_BASIS ,case when JOBS.JOB_INFORMATION_CATEGORY IN ('CA','US') then JOB_INFORMATION3 else null end JOB_FLSA_CODE ,to_date('~DATE~', 'YYYYMMDD') as SNASHOT_DATE ,paaf.SUPERVISOR_ID as SUPERVISOR_ID ,paaf.job_id ,paaf.location_id ,paaf.grade_id ,NVL(ppb.pay_annualization_factor, NVL(tpt.number_per_fiscal_year, 1)) annualization_factor ,CASE WHEN ppb.attribute1 IN ('AE', 'QA','KW', 'SA') AND SAL_MENA.attribute2 is not null THEN SAL_MENA.attribute2 ELSE SAL.attribute2 END as attribute2 ,CASE WHEN ppb.attribute1 IN ('AE', 'QA','KW', 'SA') AND SAL_MENA.proposed_salary_n is not null THEN SAL_MENA.proposed_salary_n ELSE SAL.proposed_salary_n END as proposed_salary_n ,paaf.PAY_BASIS_ID ,pgrf.RATE_ID ,paaf.manager_flag ,pabv.value AS FTE ,CASE WHEN ppb.attribute1 IN ('AE', 'QA','KW', 'SA') AND SAL_MENA.attribute3 is not null THEN SAL_MENA.attribute3 ELSE SAL.attribute3 END AS PPP_ATTRIBUTE3 ,CASE WHEN ppb.attribute1 IN ('AE', 'QA','KW', 'SA') AND SAL_MENA.attribute4 is not null THEN SAL_MENA.attribute4 ELSE SAL.attribute4 END AS PPP_ATTRIBUTE4 ,CASE WHEN ppb.attribute1 IN ('AE', 'QA','KW', 'SA') AND SAL_MENA.LAST_CHANGE_DATE is not null THEN SAL_MENA.LAST_CHANGE_DATE ELSE SAL.LAST_CHANGE_DATE END AS PPP_LAST_CHANGE_DATE ,CASE WHEN ppb.attribute1 IN ('AE', 'QA','KW', 'SA') AND SAL_MENA.NEXT_SAL_REVIEW_DATE is not null THEN SAL_MENA.NEXT_SAL_REVIEW_DATE ELSE SAL.NEXT_SAL_REVIEW_DATE END AS NEXT_SAL_REVIEW_DATE /*,hr_general.decode_lookup('PROPOSAL_REASON', SAL.PROPOSAL_REASON) AS X_SALARY_CHANGE_REASON*/ ,REA.Meaning AS X_SALARY_CHANGE_REASON ,CASE WHEN ppb.attribute1 IN ('AE', 'QA','KW', 'SA') AND SAL_MENA.CHANGE_DATE is not null THEN SAL_MENA.CHANGE_DATE ELSE SAL.CHANGE_DATE END AS PPP_CHANGE_DATE ,CASE WHEN ppb.attribute1 IN ('AE', 'QA','KW', 'SA') AND SAL_MENA.proposed_salary_n is not null THEN SAL_MENA.proposed_salary_n ELSE SAL.proposed_salary_n END * NVL(ppb.pay_annualization_factor, NVL(tpt.number_per_fiscal_year, 1)) AS SALARY_ANNL ,(CASE WHEN ppb.attribute1 IN ('AE', 'QA','KW', 'SA') AND SAL_MENA.proposed_salary_n is not null THEN SAL_MENA.proposed_salary_n ELSE SAL.proposed_salary_n END * case when ppb.pay_basis = 'MONTHLY' then 1 else NVL(ppb.pay_annualization_factor, NVL(tpt.number_per_fiscal_year, 1))/12 end) AS SALARY_MONTH ,ppb.input_value_id ,NULL AS LEAVING_REASON ,paaf.normal_hours ,case when newhire.assignment_id is null then '0' else '1' end AS NEW_HIRE_FLG ,newhire.DATE_START AS NEW_HIRE_DT ,paaf.frequency ,ppb.attribute2 as sal_attribute2 ,paaf.ass_attribute27 ,ppt.user_person_type ,substr(hou1.name,4,6) AS PU ,NVL(INR_SAL.INR_Basic_Monthly_Salary,0) INR_Basic_Monthly_Salary ,NVL(INR_SAL.INR_Basic_Annual_Salary,0) INR_Basic_Annual_Salary ,NVL(X_UPLIFT_FLAG,'N') X_UPLIFT_FLAG FROM per_all_people_f papf , per_all_assignments_f paaf , per_person_types ppt , per_person_types ppt2 , per_person_type_usages_f pptu , per_assignment_status_types past , HR_LOCATIONS loc , PER_PAY_BASES ppb , apps.per_time_period_types tpt , apps.pay_all_payrolls_f prl , per_jobs jobs , PER_GRADES pg , PAY_GRADE_RULES_F pgrf , apps.HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS hou1 , (select ppp.attribute2 as attribute2 ,ppp.ASSIGNMENT_ID as ASSIGNMENT_ID ,ppp.proposed_salary_n as proposed_salary_n , ppp.Attribute3, ppp.Attribute4, ppp.LAST_CHANGE_DATE, ppp.NEXT_SAL_REVIEW_DATE, ppp.PROPOSAL_REASON , ppp.CHANGE_DATE from per_pay_proposals ppp, (SELECT MAX(PAY_PROPOSAL_ID) PAY_PROPOSAL_ID,PAAF1.ASSIGNMENT_ID ASSIGNMENT_ID FROM per_all_assignments_f paaf1, per_pay_proposals ppp1 WHERE to_date('~DATE~', 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN ppp1.change_date(+) AND ppp1.date_to(+) AND to_date('~DATE~', 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN paaf1.effective_start_date AND paaf1.effective_end_date AND PAAF1.ASSIGNMENT_ID=PPP1.ASSIGNMENT_ID AND ppp1.APPROVED = 'Y' GROUP BY PAAF1.ASSIGNMENT_ID ) PAYID where ppp.assignment_id(+)=PAYID.assignment_id AND PAYID.PAY_PROPOSAL_ID=PPP.PAY_PROPOSAL_ID)SAL
, (select ppp2.assignment_id , ppp2.pay_proposal_id , ppp2.attribute2 as attribute2 , to_number(ppp2.attribute5) as proposed_salary_n , ppp2.attribute3 , ppp2.attribute4 , ppp2.last_change_date , ppp2.next_sal_review_date , ppp2.proposal_reason , ppp2.change_date from per_pay_proposals_v2 ppp2, (select pppa.pay_proposal_id , pppa.change_date , paaf2.assignment_id from per_all_assignments_f paaf2 , (select assignment_id, max(pay_proposal_id) as pay_proposal_id , change_date, date_to from (select assignment_id, pay_proposal_id, approved, change_date, nvl(lead(change_date, 1) over (partition by assignment_id order by change_date)-1, to_date('31/12/4712', 'DD/MM/YYYY')) as date_to from per_pay_proposals_v2 where approved = 'Y' ) group by assignment_id, change_date, date_to) pppa where to_date('~DATE~', 'YYYYMMDD') between pppa.change_date and pppa.date_to and to_date('~DATE~', 'YYYYMMDD') between paaf2.effective_start_date and paaf2.effective_end_date and paaf2.assignment_id = pppa.assignment_id ) payid2 where ppp2.assignment_id = payid2.assignment_id and ppp2.pay_proposal_id = payid2.pay_proposal_id and ppp2.change_date = payid2.change_date ) SAL_MENA
, (SELECT assignment_id, value FROM PER_ASSIGNMENT_BUDGET_VALUES_F WHERE to_date('~DATE~', 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN effective_start_date AND effective_end_date AND UNIT = 'FTE') pabv,
(select paaf.assignment_id, max(PPOS.DATE_START) as DATE_START from PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE ppos inner join per_all_assignments_f paaf on ppos.person_id = PAAF.PERSON_ID and PAAF.PRIMARY_FLAG = 'Y' where to_char(to_date('~DATE~', 'YYYYMMDD'),'yyyymm') = to_char(PPOS.DATE_START, 'yyyymm') group by paaf.assignment_id order by paaf.assignment_id)newhire,
(SELECT Meaning, lookup_code FROM apps.fnd_lookup_values flv WHERE flv.language = 'US' AND flv.lookup_type = 'PROPOSAL_REASON')REA,
(Select person_id ,sum(INR_Basic_Monthly_Salary) as INR_Basic_Monthly_Salary ,sum(INR_Basic_Annual_Salary) as INR_Basic_Annual_Salary from (SELECT paaf.person_id ,(Case pivf.name When 'Percent' then cast(peev.screen_entry_value as float)*.01* ppp.PROPOSED_SALARY_N When 'Flat Amount' then cast(peev.screen_entry_value as float) When 'Amount' then cast(peev.screen_entry_value as float) Else 0 END) as INR_Basic_Monthly_Salary ,(Case pivf.name When 'Percent' then cast(peev.screen_entry_value as float)*.01* ppp.PROPOSED_SALARY_N When 'Flat Amount' then cast(peev.screen_entry_value as float) When 'Amount' then cast(peev.screen_entry_value as float) Else 0 END) * ppb.pay_annualization_factor as INR_Basic_Annual_Salary FROM per_all_assignments_f paaf ,per_pay_proposals ppp ,per_periods_of_service ppos ,per_pay_bases ppb ,pay_element_entries_f peef ,pay_element_types_f petf ,pay_element_entry_values_f peev ,pay_input_values_f pivf WHERE 1=1 AND paaf.assignment_id = ppp.assignment_id AND paaf.person_id = ppos.person_id AND paaf.pay_basis_id = ppb.pay_basis_id AND paaf.assignment_id = peef.assignment_id AND peef.element_type_id = petf.element_type_id AND peef.element_entry_id = peev.element_entry_id AND peef.element_type_id = pivf.element_type_id AND peev.input_value_id = pivf.input_value_id AND to_date('~DATE~', 'YYYYMMDD') between peef.effective_start_date AND peef.effective_end_date AND to_date('~DATE~', 'YYYYMMDD') between peev.effective_start_date and peev.effective_end_date AND to_date('~DATE~', 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN paaf.effective_start_date AND paaf.effective_end_date AND to_date('~DATE~', 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN ppos.date_start AND NVL(ppos.actual_termination_date, trunc(sysdate)) AND to_date('~DATE~', 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN ppp.change_date AND ppp.date_to AND paaf.primary_flag = 'Y' AND paaf.assignment_type = 'E' AND ppb.attribute1 = 'IN' AND ( (to_date('~DATE~', 'YYYYMMDD') >= to_date('20201001', 'YYYYMMDD') AND to_date('~DATE~', 'YYYYMMDD') < to_date('20220901', 'YYYYMMDD') AND petf.attribute11 = 'S') OR (to_date('~DATE~', 'YYYYMMDD') < to_date('20201001', 'YYYYMMDD') AND petf.ELEMENT_NAME in ( 'IN JEG Other Amount INFRA' ,'IN JEG Variable Allowance' ,'IN JEG Special Allowance' ,'IN JEG Adhoc Amount' ,'IN Cellular Allowance' ,'IN JEG House Rent Allowance' ,'IN JEG City Compensatory Allowance' ,'IN JEG House Maintenance Allowance' ,'IN JEG LTA' ,'IN JEG Education Allowance' ,'IN JEG Management Allowance' ,'IN JEG Telephone Reimbursement Taxable' ,'IN JEG Company Car Allowance Taxable' ,'IN JEG Dearness Allowance' ,'IN JEG Conveyance Allowance' ,'IN JEG Medical Allowance' ,'IN JEG Variable Pay' ,'IN JEG Leave Travel Allowance Amount' ,'IN JEG Books and Periodicals Amount' ,'IN JEG House Rent Allowance Amount' ,'IN JEG Other Allowance Amount' ,'IN JEG Provident Fund Amount' ,'IN JEG Sodexo Meal Coupons Amount' ,'IN JEG Telephone Fax Internet Connection Reimb Amount' ,'IN JEG HRA Percent' )) ) ) group by person_id) INR_SAL ,(select distinct 'Y' AS X_UPLIFT_FLAG ,assignment_id from pay_element_entries_f peef , pay_element_types_f petf where petf.element_type_id = peef.element_type_id AND trunc(sysdate) BETWEEN peef.effective_start_date AND peef.effective_end_date AND upper(element_name) like '%UPLIFT%' )UPLIFT
WHERE paaf.person_id = papf.person_id AND pptu.person_id = papf.person_id AND papf.person_id = INR_SAL.person_id(+) AND ppt.person_type_id = pptu.person_type_id AND papf.person_type_id = ppt2.person_type_id (+) AND past.assignment_status_type_id (+) = paaf.assignment_status_type_id AND paaf.location_id = loc.location_id (+) AND ppb.pay_basis_id = paaf.pay_basis_id AND paaf.GRADE_ID = pg.GRADE_ID(+) AND pg.GRADE_ID = pgrf.GRADE_OR_SPINAL_POINT_ID(+) AND paaf.job_id=jobs.job_id(+) AND to_date('~DATE~', 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN papf.effective_start_date AND papf.effective_end_date AND to_date('~DATE~', 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN paaf.effective_start_date AND paaf.effective_end_date AND to_date('~DATE~', 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN pptu.effective_start_date AND pptu.effective_end_date AND paaf.effective_start_date BETWEEN prl.effective_start_date (+) AND prl.effective_end_date (+) AND paaf.payroll_id = prl.payroll_id (+) AND paaf.assignment_id=newhire.assignment_id(+) AND prl.period_type=tpt.period_type (+) AND SAL.ASSIGNMENT_ID(+)=PAAF.ASSIGNMENT_ID AND REA.lookup_code(+) = SAL.PROPOSAL_REASON AND paaf.assignment_id = SAL_MENA.assignment_id(+) AND paaf.assignment_id = pabv.assignment_id (+) AND paaf.primary_flag = 'Y' AND paaf.assignment_id=UPLIFT.assignment_id(+) AND ppt.system_person_type IN ('EMP','EMP_APL') AND (ppt.user_person_type LIKE 'Employee%' OR ppt.user_person_type LIKE 'Expatriate%' OR ppt.user_person_type LIKE 'Job Shopper%') -- Active Employees only AND paaf.ORGANIZATION_ID = hou1.ORGANIZATION_ID(+) -- remove duplicate assignments due to multiple person types AND ((ppt2.system_person_type IN ('EMP','EMP_APL') AND (ppt2.user_person_type LIKE 'Employee%' OR ppt2.user_person_type LIKE 'Expatriate%' OR ppt2.user_person_type LIKE 'Job Shopper%')) OR ppt2.person_type_id IS NULL) AND papf.business_group_id NOT IN (SELECT /*+ USE_HASH( ffvs PPTU) */ hou.organization_id FROM apps.fnd_flex_value_sets ffvs , apps.fnd_flex_values ffv , apps.fnd_flex_values_tl ffvt, apps.HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS hou WHERE ffvs.flex_value_set_id = ffv.flex_value_set_id AND ffv.flex_value_id = ffvt.flex_value_id AND ffvt.language = 'US' AND ffvs.flex_value_set_name = 'JEG_HR_INTERFACE_BG_EXCLUSION_LIST' AND ffv.flex_value = hou.name) -- AND paaf.PERSON_ID = 2692843 --AND NVL(papf.attribute13,0) not like '%CH%' --AND (nvl(papf.attribute13, 'NULL') in ('CH2CA', 'CH2PL', 'CH2UK', 'CH2US', 'CH2IE') --OR nvl(papf.attribute13, 'NULL') not like 'CH2%') --AND paaf.soft_coding_keyflex_id not in ( --select k.soft_coding_keyflex_id from hr_soft_coding_keyflex k --inner join hr_all_organization_units u on (k.segment1 = to_char(u.organization_id) ) --where name like 'CO-0675%' or name like 'CO-0676%' )

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT CASE WHEN PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE.ADJUSTED_SVC_DATE IS NULL THEN PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE.DATE_START ELSE PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE.ADJUSTED_SVC_DATE END AS ADJUSTED_SVC_DATE, PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE.PERSON_ID AS PERSON_ID, PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE.DATE_START AS DATE_START, CASE WHEN PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE.ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DATE IS NULL THEN TO_DATE('47121231','YYYYMMDD') ELSE PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE.ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DATE END AS ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DATE FROM PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: PERSON_ID = PERSON_ID_IN AND DATE_START <= SNAPSHOT_DATE AND ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DATE >= SNAPSHOT_DATE

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Maximum Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Maximum Percentage of Total Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Additional Concurrent Pipelines for Lookup Cache Creation
Save session log for these runs
Session Log File Max Time Period
Sql Query
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE: (select max(to_char(trunc(load_dt),'yyyymmdd')) as dates from w_etl_run_s) union (select distinct to_char(to_date(M_END_CAL_DT_WID,'yyyymmdd'),'yyyymmdd') from w_day_d where calendar_date between add_months(to_date(to_char((select max(load_dt) from w_etl_run_s),'yyyymmdd'),'yyyymmdd'),-11) and add_months(to_date(to_char((select max(load_dt) from w_etl_run_s),'yyyymmdd'),'yyyymmdd'),-1))

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT QN.person_id AS PERSON_ID, QN.fiscal_month AS FISCAL_MONTH, QN.interview_type AS INTERVIEW_TYPE, QN.rating AS RATING, QN.review_date AS REVIEW_DATE, to_date((lead(to_number(to_char(QN.review_date,'yyyymmdd')),1,47121231)over(partition by QN.person_id order by QN.person_id,QN.fiscal_month)),'yyyymmdd') as next_reveiw_date FROM (SELECT person_id, EXTRACT (YEAR FROM a.review_date) || '/' || LPAD(EXTRACT (MONTH FROM a.review_date), 2, '0') AS Fiscal_Month, rank() OVER (partition BY person_id,EXTRACT (YEAR FROM a.review_date) || '/' || LPAD(EXTRACT (MONTH FROM a.review_date), 2, '0') ORDER BY person_id,EXTRACT (YEAR FROM a.review_date) || '/' || LPAD(EXTRACT (MONTH FROM a.review_date), 2, '0'), a.review_date DESC) AS ranks, (SELECT meaning FROM apps.fnd_lookup_values WHERE lookup_type = 'EMP_INTERVIEW_TYPE' AND language = 'US' AND lookup_code = b.type ) AS interview_type, (SELECT meaning FROM apps.fnd_lookup_values WHERE lookup_type = 'PERFORMANCE_RATING' AND language = 'US' AND lookup_code = a.performance_rating ) AS Rating, a.review_date FROM per_performance_reviews a, per_events b WHERE a.event_id = b.event_id --and a.person_id in( 98873 ,98601) AND TRUNC(a.review_date, 'MONTH') >= to_date('01-10-2014', 'DD-MM-YYYY') ORDER BY 1,2,5 ) QN WHERE ranks = 1

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: PERSON_ID = IN_PERSON_ID AND REVIEW_DATE <= SNAPSHOT_DATE AND NEXT_REVEIW_DATE > SNAPSHOT_DATE

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.ORGANIZATION_ID ||'@' ||PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID ||'@' || PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.LOCATION_ID ||'@' || PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.JOB_ID as SUP_BUS_ORG_ID, PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.PERSON_ID AS PERSON_ID, PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AS EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE AS EFFECTIVE_END_DATE from PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: PERSON_ID = Supervisor_id AND EFFECTIVE_START_DATE <= Snapshot_date AND EFFECTIVE_END_DATE >= Snapshot_date

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: to_char(ASSIGNMENT_STATUS_TYPE_ID) || '~' || to_char(PERSON_TYPE_ID) || '~'|| ASSIGNMENT_TYPE || '~'|| PRIMARY_FLAG || '~'|| EMPLOYMENT_CATEGORY || '~'|| LABOUR_UNION_MEMBER_FLAG || '~'|| PAY_BASIS || '~'|| JOB_FLSA_CODE
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: EMPLOYMENT_ID

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT PER_PERFORMANCE_REVIEWS.NEXT_PERF_REVIEW_DATE AS NEXT_PERF_REVIEW_DATE, PER_PERFORMANCE_REVIEWS.PERSON_ID AS PERSON_ID, PER_PERFORMANCE_REVIEWS.REVIEW_DATE AS REVIEW_DATE FROM PER_PERFORMANCE_REVIEWS

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: select assignment_id as ASSIGNMENT_ID,change_date AS CHANGE_DATE,PROPOSED_SALARY_N AS PREV_PROPOSED_SALARY_N from per_pay_proposals

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: select VALUE.INPUT_VALUE_ID as INPUT_VALUE_ID, ELMNT.input_currency_code AS INPUT_CURRENCY_CODE from PAY_ELEMENT_TYPES_F ELMNT, PAY_INPUT_VALUES_F VALUE where ELMNT.ELEMENT_TYPE_ID=VALUE.ELEMENT_TYPE_ID

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT temp.ASSIGNMENT_ID as ASSIGNMENT_ID, temp.ORG_ENTRY_DATE as ORG_ENTRY_DATE , temp.ORGANIZATION_ID as ORGANIZATION_ID FROM (SELECT CURR_org.ASSIGNMENT_ID, MIN(curr_org.effective_Start_date) AS ORG_ENTRY_DATE, curr_org.ORGANIZATION_ID AS ORGANIZATION_ID, prev_org.ORGANIZATION_ID AS PREV_ORGANIZATION_ID, MAX(NVL(prev_org.effective_end_date, to_date(19010101, 'YYYYMMDD'))) AS ORG_EXIT_DATE
FROM PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F curr_org LEFT OUTER JOIN PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F prev_org ON curr_org.assignment_id = prev_org.assignment_id AND curr_org.effective_Start_date > prev_org.effective_end_date AND curr_org.ORGANIZATION_ID <> prev_org.ORGANIZATION_ID
WHERE curr_org.ORGANIZATION_ID IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY CURR_org.ASSIGNMENT_ID, curr_org.ORGANIZATION_ID, prev_org.ORGANIZATION_ID) temp
GROUP BY ASSIGNMENT_ID, ORG_ENTRY_DATE, ORGANIZATION_ID

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: ASSIGNMENT_ID = ASSIGNMENT_ID_I AND ORG_ENTRY_DATE <= SNAPSHOT_DATE_IN AND ORGANIZATION_ID = ORGANIZATION_ID_IN

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT temp.ASSIGNMENT_ID as ASSIGNMENT_ID, temp.JOB_ENTRY_DATE as JOB_ENTRY_DATE,temp.JOB_ID as JOB_ID FROM (SELECT CURR_job.ASSIGNMENT_ID, MIN(curr_job.effective_Start_date) AS JOB_ENTRY_DATE, curr_job.JOB_ID AS JOB_ID, prev_job.JOB_ID AS PREV_JOB_ID, MAX(NVL(prev_job.effective_end_date, to_date(19010101, 'YYYYMMDD'))) AS JOB_EXIT_DATE
FROM PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F curr_job LEFT OUTER JOIN PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F prev_job ON curr_job.assignment_id = prev_job.assignment_id AND curr_job.effective_Start_date > prev_job.effective_end_date AND curr_job.JOB_ID <> prev_job.JOB_ID
WHERE curr_job.JOB_ID IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY CURR_job.ASSIGNMENT_ID, curr_job.JOB_ID, prev_job.JOB_ID) temp
GROUP BY ASSIGNMENT_ID, JOB_ENTRY_DATE, JOB_ID

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: ASSIGNMENT_ID = ASSIGNMENT_ID_IN AND JOB_ENTRY_DATE <= SNAPSHOT_DATE_IN AND JOB_ID = JOB_ID_IN

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.PERSON_ID as PERSON_ID, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID as BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.PERF_RATING as PERF_RATING, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.DFLT_RATING_PCT as DFLT_RATING_PCT, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.RATING_LEVEL_ID as RATING_LEVEL_ID, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.PERFORMANCE_REVIEW_ID as PERFORMANCE_REVIEW_ID, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.PERF_REVIEW_TYPE as PERF_REVIEW_TYPE, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.X_REVIEW_TYPE as X_REVIEW_TYPE, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.TEMPLATE_NAME as TEMPLATE_NAME, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.TEMPLATE_ID as TEMPLATE_ID, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.DATA_LAST_UPDATE_DATE as DATA_LAST_UPDATE_DATE, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.PROCESS_FLG as PROCESS_FLG, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.ASSIGNMENT_ID as ASSIGNMENT_ID, WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE as EFFECTIVE_START_DATE FROM WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP WC_WRKFC_HEADCNT_TEMP

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT temp.ASSIGNMENT_ID as ASSIGNMENT_ID, temp.GRD_ENTRY_DATE as GRD_ENTRY_DATE, temp.GRADE_ID as GRADE_ID FROM (SELECT CURR_GRD.ASSIGNMENT_ID, MIN(curr_grd.effective_Start_date) AS GRD_ENTRY_DATE, curr_grd.grade_id AS GRADE_ID, prev_grd.grade_id AS PREV_GRADE_ID, MAX(NVL(prev_grd.effective_end_date, to_date(19010101, 'YYYYMMDD'))) AS GRD_EXIT_DATE
FROM PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F curr_grd LEFT OUTER JOIN PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F prev_grd ON curr_grd.assignment_id = prev_grd.assignment_id AND curr_grd.effective_Start_date > prev_grd.effective_end_date AND curr_grd.grade_id <> prev_grd.grade_id
WHERE curr_grd.grade_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY CURR_GRD.ASSIGNMENT_ID, curr_grd.grade_id, prev_grd.grade_id) temp
GROUP BY ASSIGNMENT_ID, GRD_ENTRY_DATE, GRADE_ID

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: ASSIGNMENT_ID = ASSIGNMENT_ID_IN AND GRD_ENTRY_DATE <= SNAPSHOT_DATE_IN AND GRADE_ID = GRADE_ID_IN

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF ((BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = 0 OR BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = 880 OR BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = 1394 OR BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = 3467 OR BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = 3469),:LKP.LKP_GRE_ID (SOFT_CODING_KEYFLEX_ID),X_ASS_ATTRIBUTE16 )
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: out_GRE_ID

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT CASE WHEN PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE.ADJUSTED_SVC_DATE IS NULL THEN PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE.DATE_START ELSE PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE.ADJUSTED_SVC_DATE END AS ADJUSTED_SVC_DATE, PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE.PERSON_ID AS PERSON_ID, PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE.DATE_START AS DATE_START, CASE WHEN PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE.ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DATE IS NULL THEN TO_DATE('47121231','YYYYMMDD') ELSE PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE.ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DATE END AS ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DATE FROM PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: PERSON_ID = PERSON_ID_IN AND DATE_START <= SNAPSHOT_DATE AND ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DATE >= SNAPSHOT_DATE

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT CASE WHEN PEI_INFORMATION1 = 'YES' THEN 'Y' ELSE PEI_INFORMATION1 END AS ECR_FLAG , PERSON_ID AS PERSON_ID FROM PER_PEOPLE_EXTRA_INFO WHERE INFORMATION_TYPE = 'JEG_HR_DIVESTITURE_NEW'--

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT paaf.ASSIGNMENT_ID as ASSIGNMENT_ID, paaf.JOB_ID as JOB_ID, paaf.GRADE_ID as GRADE_ID, paaf.PERSON_ID as PERSON_ID, paaf.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE as EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, paaf.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE as EFFECTIVE_END_DATE FROM PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F paaf where paaf.PRIMARY_FLAG='Y'

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: PERSON_ID = IN_PERSON_ID AND EFFECTIVE_START_DATE <= IN_SNAPSHOT_DATE AND EFFECTIVE_END_DATE >= IN_SNAPSHOT_DATE

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT paaf.ASS_ATTRIBUTE27 as SUP_BUS_ORG_ID, paaf.PERSON_ID AS PERSON_ID, paaf.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AS EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, paaf.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE AS EFFECTIVE_END_DATE from PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F paaf, per_person_type_usages_f pptu, per_person_types ppt where paaf.person_id = pptu.person_id and ppt.person_type_id = pptu.person_type_id and paaf.business_group_id=0 and ppt.user_person_type like 'Expatriate%' and paaf.primary_flag='Y'

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: PERSON_ID = Supervisor_id AND EFFECTIVE_START_DATE <= Snapshot_date AND EFFECTIVE_END_DATE >= Snapshot_date

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT paaf.ASSIGNMENT_ID as ASSIGNMENT_ID, paaf.PAY_BASIS_ID as PAY_BASIS_ID, paaf.PERSON_ID as PERSON_ID, paaf.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE as EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, paaf.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE as EFFECTIVE_END_DATE FROM PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F paaf where paaf.PRIMARY_FLAG='Y'

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: PERSON_ID = IN_PERSON_ID AND EFFECTIVE_START_DATE <= IN_SNAPSHOT_DATE AND EFFECTIVE_END_DATE >= IN_SNAPSHOT_DATE

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Pre SQL
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
DROP TABLE PAY_GRADE_RATES_LOOKUP;
CREATE TABLE PAY_GRADE_RATES_LOOKUP AS SELECT PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.PERSON_ID , CASE WHEN PER_GRADES.GRADE_ID IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE PER_GRADES.GRADE_ID END GRADE_ID , CASE WHEN PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.PAY_BASIS_ID IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.PAY_BASIS_ID END AS PAY_BASIS_ID , CASE WHEN PAY_GRADE_RULES_F.RATE_ID IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE PAY_GRADE_RULES_F.RATE_ID END AS RATE_ID , PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE.ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DATE FROM PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F@EPROD LEFT OUTER JOIN PER_PAY_BASES@EPROD ON PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.PAY_BASIS_ID = PER_PAY_BASES.PAY_BASIS_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE@EPROD ON PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.PERSON_ID = PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE.PERSON_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN PER_GRADES@EPROD ON PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.GRADE_ID = PER_GRADES.GRADE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN PER_GRADE_DEFINITIONS@EPROD ON PER_GRADES.GRADE_DEFINITION_ID = PER_GRADE_DEFINITIONS.GRADE_DEFINITION_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN PAY_GRADE_RULES_F@EPROD ON PER_GRADES.GRADE_ID = PAY_GRADE_RULES_F.GRADE_OR_SPINAL_POINT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN PAY_RATES@EPROD ON PAY_GRADE_RULES_F.RATE_ID = PAY_RATES.RATE_ID WHERE 1=1 AND TRUNC(PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE.ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DATE) BETWEEN PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE AND TRUNC(PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE.ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DATE) BETWEEN PAY_GRADE_RULES_F.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND PAY_GRADE_RULES_F.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE ORDER BY PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F.PERSON_ID, PER_GRADES.GRADE_ID;

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Pre SQL
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections

WORKFLOW.DESCRIPTION: These workflows are created from the Workflow Generation Wizard.
WORKFLOW.NAME: SDE_EmployeeHeadCount

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $JEG_SDE_ORA_TRUNCATE_DIM_HR.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $JEG_SDE_ORA_TRUNCATE_DIM_HR.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $JEG_SDE_ORA_TRUNCATE_DIM_HR.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $SDE_EmployeeHeadCount2.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $SDE_EmployeeHeadCount2.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $SDE_EmployeeHeadCount2.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $SDE_EmployeeHeadCount1.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $SDE_EmployeeHeadCount1.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $SDE_EmployeeHeadCount1.ErrorMsg

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Workflow Log File
Save workflow log for these runs
Allow concurrent run with unique run instance name
Allow concurrent run with same run instance name
Maximum number of concurrent runs per Hub
